channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 14.5%.

item.title:
Bluesky · @jessicaelgot.bsky.social: Spent the day in parts of Ashton and Orrell where Labour canvassers are targeting the 16% of undecided voters in Makerfield by-election.
A few observations (from a single day) I found surprising
- A lot of people w...
item.description:

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Cautious Keir seeks to cement his legacy as he plods towards the exit | John Crace
item.description: Cautious Keir seeks to cement his legacy as he plods towards the exit | John Crace

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Child phone nudity law could largely end online child sexual abuse if widely adopted, Jess Phillips claims - as it happened

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer issues three-month ultimatum for tech firms to ban nude images on children’s phones
item.description: Starmer issues three-month ultimatum for tech firms to ban nude images on children’s phones

item.title:
Bluesky · @pippacrerar.bsky.social: 🚨Is Keir Starmer in his ‘legacy’ era? In latest #PoliticsWeekly podcast @kiranstacey.bsky.social & I discuss PM’s plans for
📱social media ban for under 16s 💷billions extra for defence spending 🇪🇺 next EU reset...
item.description:

📱social media ban for under 16s 💷billions extra for defence spending 🇪🇺 next EU reset...

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Chagos Islands ‘not a piece of real estate for sale’, Trump warned amid reports he wants to buy territory
